title: CypherX Service-to-Service Token Claims (Contract 12)
description: Claims of a short-lived service token used by internal (and external, via client_credentials) services to authenticate inter-service calls. Same JWT shape for internal (sub=svc:<name>) and external (sub=svc-ext:<client_id>) callers; they are distinguished at the service_acl layer, not the token-validation layer. Forward-compatibility: additionalProperties is true and only validation-mandatory claims are required.

iss.description: Issuer. Resolves to the deployment's AUTH_ISSUER_URL (e.g. https://auth.cypherx.ai).

sub.description: Subject. 'svc:<service-name>' for internal in-cluster services (bootstrap-secret or, from Phase 13, SPIFFE). 'svc-ext:<client_id>' for external callers via OAuth2 client_credentials.

aud.description: Audience. Either an array of target service names, or the literal string "*" (any internal service). First cycle issues aud=["*"]; Phase 13 narrows to per-target after SPIFFE migration.

exp.description: Expiry (NumericDate). Internal service tokens are 5-minute-lived; external client_credentials tokens have TTL ≤ 1 hour.

service_name.description: Logical name of the calling service (e.g. xagent, llms, guardrails).

service_version.description: Semantic version of the calling service (e.g. 1.0.0).

tenant_id.description: The tenant whose request is being processed (Contract 13). Optional on tokens minted for platform-internal operations not tied to a tenant.

on_behalf_of.description: The agent UUID whose work this call serves (for audit). When forwarding an agent request, this MUST match the agent_id in the forwarded agent JWT (X-Forwarded-Agent-JWT) — downstream services MUST verify the match.
